授業の概要・背景:
This course is student centered. The class functions as a community in 
which the members support each other to express themselves and students 
must primarily communicate with the teacher and all students in English 
only. The main purpose of IE is to develop communicative ability by 
providing students opportunities for expressing and processing ideas and
 opinions in oral and written forms. There is a focus on oral fluency 
development and interactive communication in every class, and students 
work on building a wider knowledge of vocabulary. Small group activities
 and projects increase practice time for speaking English and give 
students the opportunity to develop cooperative learning skills. The 
course also introduces skills and strategies students can use in 
negotiating all aspects of English communication, including 
conversation, discussion, listening, reading, and writing. Finally, 
students are given the tools needed to learn to practice their English 
skills more independently and effectively. Students will need to 
communicate and speak with each other interactively during all lessons. 
The main focus of this course is spoken fluency development.
授業方法: This course is centred mainly on discussions. Students will discuss their opinions and ideas in pairs and in small groups. Students will be involved in presentation discussions throughout the semester. Presentation discussions will be conducted in small groups. One individual in-class presentation will also be given by each student to the entire class. There will also be a focus on developing writing skills this semester.

トピック.授業計画1:
This class is conducted entirely in English and students will be expected to ONLY speak English during class. Students will be expected to actively participate in lengthy interactive discussions with classmates each lesson. This is NOT a lecture style course, it requires communicative discussions with classmates regularly 2 or 3 times each week.
Note: This syllabus may be subject to revisions according to student needs and abilities.
トピック.授業外学習2:
This is an all-English course. You greatly enhance your acquisition of 
English by speaking it. In addition, speaking Japanese limits your 
classmates’ learning opportunities. Please encourage each other to speak
 English all the time you are in the classroom, especially for casual 
conversation! You lose participation points if you speak Japanese in 
class. Furthermore, students can expect to have an average of 30 minutes
 of preparation/homework before most classes. Some classes will require 
no preparation, and some classes will require a lot of preparation.

教科書/Required texts0: There is no textbook for this course. All in-class and homework materials will be supplied by the teacher.
学位授与の方針との関連Relationship to Diploma Polic:
各授業科目は、各学部・研究科の定めるディプロマ・ポリシー（DP）・カリキュラム・ポリシー（CP）に基づき、カリキュラム上に配置されています。
DP・CPを意識して本授業科目の学修を進めることで、各学部・研究科の期待する能力が養成されます。
